THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF NORMA THOMPSON, JAMES THOMPSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting NORMA THOMPSON, decedent JAMES THOMPSON's Successor-In-Interest, as plaintiff in decedent's place and stead in Actions Nos. 321677 and 321678, And Consolidating with Actions, Nos. 413189 and 413230 For Discovery And Trial.
